question.string: After whom is the Riemannian geometry named?

query.sparql: SELECT ?entity ?entityLabel WHERE { wd:Q761383 wdt:P138 ?entity . SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" } }

question.string: Which animal participated in a military operation with the Australian Defence Force?
among the characters in the witcher, who has two unmarried partners, Yennefer of Vengerberg and Triss Merigold?
among the founders of tencent company, who has been member of national people’s congress?
among the other representative work of the author of hunter x hunter, which one is talking about middle school student?
On which stock exchanges are Siemens AG shares traded?

query.sparql: SELECT ?exchange WHERE { wd:Q81230 wdt:P414 ?exchange }

question.string: Apart from the book series the witcher, name all of the author’s notable work.
are brooke raboutou and colin duffy from same state of the usa?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?brookeState ?colinState
WHERE {
  wd:Q2926117 wdt:P27 wd:Q30 .
  wd:Q87192979 wdt:P27 wd:Q30 .
  wd:Q2926117 wdt:P131 ?brookeState .
  wd:Q87192979 wdt:P131 ?colinState .
  FILTER (?brookeState = ?colinState)
}

question.string: What is the boiling point of water?

query.sparql: SELECT ?boilingPoint WHERE { wd:Q283 wdt:P2102 ?boilingPoint }

question.string: At which school was Yayoi Kusama educated at?

query.sparql: SELECT ?school WHERE { wd:Q231121 wdt:P69 ?school }

question.string: Which High School did Allen Ginsberg attend?

query.sparql: SELECT ?school WHERE { wd:Q6711 wdt:P69 ?school . ?school wdt:P31 wd:Q9826 . }

question.string: On which island is the Indonesian capital located?
can i play don't starve on play station 4?
How many General Secretaries of the CPSU were there before Leonid Brezhnev?
How many different presidents of Russia have there been that took the position after 1990?
Did adam ondra win a medal in the 2020 summer olympics?
Did the Chicago Bulls win at least two seasons of the NBA championship?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?season1 ?season2
WHERE {
  ?season1 wdt:P2522 wd:Q11862752 .
  ?season1 wdt:P3450 wd:Q18156668 .
  ?season1 wdt:P127 wd:Q128109 .
  ?season2 wdt:P2522 wd:Q11862752 .
  ?season2 wdt:P3450 wd:Q18156668 .
  ?season2 wdt:P127 wd:Q128109 .
  FILTER (?season1 != ?season2)
}

question.string: Did Haruki Murakami receive the Nobel Prize in Literature?
Did Kobe Bryant leave the Lakers when LeBron James joined that team?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?leavingYear ?joiningYear
WHERE {
  wd:Q25369 p:P54 ?statementKobe.
  ?statementKobe ps:P54 wd:Q121783.
  ?statementKobe pq:P582 ?leavingYear.

  wd:Q36159 p:P54 ?statementLebron.
  ?statementLebron ps:P54 wd:Q121783.
  ?statementLebron pq:P580 ?joiningYear.

  FILTER (?leavingYear = ?joiningYear)
}

question.string: Did Rawson Marshall Thurber, the director of Red Notice also direct Titanic?
Did Venice at any point belong to the Austrian Empire?
Were at least two of the founders of tencent educated at the same university?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?university (COUNT(DISTINCT ?founder) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  wd:Q860580 wdt:P112 ?founder .
  ?founder wdt:P69 ?university .
}
GROUP BY ?university
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?founder) > 1)

question.string: Do all of batman’s partner speak english as native language?
How many spouses do head of states have on average?
Was there at least one Formula 1 event on the AVUS?
Find all Turkish verbs ending with “uş” with their lemma.

query.sparql:
SELECT ?item ?lemma
WHERE
{
  ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q24905 .
  ?item wdt:P1963 ?lemma .
  FILTER(STRLEN(?lemma) - STRLEN(REPLACE(?lemma, "uş", "")) = 2) .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(?lemma, "uş")) .
}

question.string: From which country are the beagles originally from?
From which country came the 2nd most winners of the Emmy Award ?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?country (COUNT(DISTINCT ?winner) AS ?count)
WHERE
{
  ?winner wdt:P166 wd:Q66716595 .
  ?winner wdt:P27 ?country .
}
GROUP BY ?country
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 2
OFFSET 1

question.string: Does the music style of Helloween belong to rock music?
Does the postal code 32423 belong to Minden?
has adam ondra been a winner of IFSC climbing world cup?
has life expectancy in iran grown in any year after 1999?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?year ?lifeExpectancy
WHERE {
  wd:Q718  p:P2250  ?statement .
  ?statement  ps:P2250  ?lifeExpectancy .
  ?statement  pq:P585  ?year .
  FILTER (?year > "1999-01-01T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime)
}
ORDER BY ?year

question.string: has population of Isfahan increased at any point after 2006?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?population ?pointInTime
WHERE {
  wd:Q11953 p:P1082 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P1082 ?population .
  ?statement pq:P585 ?pointInTime .
  FILTER (?pointInTime > "2006-01-01T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime) .
  FILTER (?population > 1586242)
}

Did Udo Bölts participate in the Tour de France?

In which manner did Hemingway die?

question.string: How is the Harz called in Mandarin Chinese?
How many international airports are located within the city of Hamburg ?
On how many albums does Madonna perform?
On how many albums does Mariah Carey perform?
How many studio albums has Lana Del Rey have?

query.sparql: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?item) AS (?count)) WHERE { ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q15749146 }

question.string: In how many years did Kobe Bryant receive an NBA All-Defensive Team award?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?year) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  wd:Q25369 p:P166 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P166 wd:Q1465181 .
  ?statement pq:P580 ?date .
  BIND(year(?date) AS ?year)
}

question.string: How many All-NBA Team awards have Shaquille O'Neal and Kobe Bryant received in the same year?
How many literary works did Richard Bachman write?
How many notable works does Sarah J. Maas have?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?work) AS (?notableWorks))
WHERE {
  wd:Q20640708 wdt:P50 ?work .
  ?work wdt:P31 wd:Q838948 .
  ?work wdt:P577 ?pubDate .
  FILTER(YEAR(?pubDate) > 0)
}

question.string: Did Bryan Evenson work for at least one university where he was educated at?
How many children (including apopted ones) does Jeff Bezos have with his ex-wife?
How many children had Paul McCartney together with his ex-wife Linda McCartney?
How many Chinese zodiac animals are there in total?
How many cities are part of the Pearl River Delta?

query.sparql: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?city) AS (?count)) WHERE { ?city wdt:P131 wd:Q1144286 . ?city wdt:P31 wd:Q515 }

question.string: How many city-states are currently in the world?

query.sparql: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?item) AS (?count)) WHERE { ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q133442 . }

question.string: How many businesses did Steve Jobs found?
How many countries have a democracy index higher than 7 and drive on the left side ?

query.sparql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ?country)
WHERE {
  ?country wdt:P31 wd:Q6256 .
  ?country wdt:P1889 ?democracyIndex .
  FILTER (?democracyIndex > 7) .
  ?country wdt:P1687 "left" .
}

question.string: How many countries have never been members of the UN?
How many countries are on the continent of South America ?
How many countries have mountains whose peaks are higher than 2000m above sea level?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?country) AS (?count))
WHERE {
  ?mountain wdt:P31 wd:Q8502 .
  ?mountain wdt:P2044 ?elevation .
  FILTER (?elevation > 2000) .
  ?mountain wdt:P4552|wdt:P361 ?mountainRange .
  ?mountainRange wdt:P361|wdt:P279* ?country .
  ?country wdt:P31 wd:Q6256 .
}

question.string: How many fictional dragons are present in Game of Thrones?
how many emmy awards has the tv series game of thrones won?
How many films are derived from the original Ghost in the Shell Manga?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?film) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?manga wdt:P31 wd:Q37045846 .
  ?film wdt:P444 ?manga .
  ?manga wdt:P13707 "Ghost in the Shell" .
  ?film wdt:P31 wd:Q11424 .
}

question.string: How many French kings didn't die of natural causes?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?item) AS (?count))
WHERE {
  ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q838695 .
  ?item wdt:P27 wd:Q142 .
  ?item wdt:P509 ?cause .
  FILTER (?cause != wd:Q3739104) .
}

question.string: How many given names has Queen Elizabeth II ?

query.sparql: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?givenName) AS ?count) WHERE { wd:Q9682 wdt:P735 ?givenName }

how many head of the state does iran have?
How many scholary articles have ImageNet as a subject?
How many inhabitants does the birthplace of Cristiano Ronaldo have?
How many Japanese writers received the Nobel Prize?
How many languages are widely used in India?
How many different colors can water take?
How many locations has Georges Braque worked at (work location)?

query.sparql: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?location) AS ?count) WHERE { wd:Q153793 p:P937 ?statement . ?statement ps:P937 ?location . }

question.string: How many months does winter consist of in Germany?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?month) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  wd:Q183 wdt:P2564 ?climate .
  ?climate wdt:P5252 ?winterView .
  ?winterView wdt:P2922 ?month .
  FILTER(wd:Q1485942 = ?winterView)
}

question.string: How many movies does the Scream franchise have?

query.sparql: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?item) AS (?count)) WHERE { ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q11424; wdt:P161 wd:Q116867588 . }

question.string: How many movies has James Cameron directed prior to the year 2010?

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?movie) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?movie wdt:P57 wd:Q183967 .
  ?movie wdt:P577 ?releaseDate .
  ?releaseDate wdt:P585 ?year .
  FILTER (?year < 2010)
}

How many literary works besides The Picture of Dorian Gray did its author write?
How many literary works did Mark Twain write in his lifetime?

how many official languages does the united states of america have?

question.string: How many Oscars did all the movies directed by Hayao Miyazaki combined win?
How many paintings of Pablo Picasso were ever in a museum?

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?item) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?item wdt:P106 wd:Q855091 .
  ?item wdt:P112 wd:Q5593 .
  ?item wdt:P6379 ?collection .
  ?collection wdt:P31 wd:Q207694 .
}

question.string: How many people can play "Mensch ärgere dich nicht" at most?
How many people did Oscar Pistorius kill?
How many people died due to the Great Leap Forward according to the highest estimate?
How many people have won the Nobel Prize in Literature since its inception?
How many people live in cities in the vicinity of the Nile ?
How many pitch classes are part of the chromatic scale?
how many plays has William Shakespeare written in the 16th century.

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?play) AS ?number_of_plays)
WHERE {
  wd:Q692 p:P800 ?play .
  ?play wdt:P577 ?publicationDate .
  FILTER(YEAR(?publicationDate) < 1601) .
  ?play wdt:P101 wd:Q839559 .
}

question.string: How many poems did Allen Ginsberg published?
How many political parties have ever had seats in the German Bundestag ?
How many positions did Kobe Bryant play in his team?
How many prizes are there established by Alfred Nobel ?
Did SpaceX ever operate a space mission that was a failed launch?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?spaceMission ?launchStatus
WHERE {
  ?spaceMission wdt:P31 wd:Q2133344 .
  ?spaceMission wdt:P1056 wd:Q193701 .
  ?spaceMission wdt:P1951 ?launchStatus .
  FILTER CONTAINS(str(?launchStatus), "failed")
}
